requirements.summary: Remove the 'View Formulas' action from the calculator action bar and ensure the 'All Formulas' dialog cannot be opened from the UI, without impacting other actions.
acceptanceCriteria: The action bar no longer shows a button labeled "View Formulas".
The formulas dialog (titled "All Formulas") is not rendered or otherwise accessible through the UI.
All other calculator actions (Use Example, Reset, Copy Shareable Link, and Run Dev Check in development) continue to work as before.
The app compiles with no unused state/handlers/props related to the removed formulas UI.

file_operations.description: Remove all state and handlers related to opening the formulas dialog, stop passing any formulas-related props to CalculatorActions, and remove the FormulasDialog import and render so the dialog is no longer mounted or reachable from the UI.

Remove the optional formulas action API (onShowFormulas) and the conditional rendering of the "View Formulas" button (including any now-unused icon imports), while keeping the existing behaviors for Use Example, Reset, Copy Shareable Link, and Run Dev Check unchanged.
